headline: Jim Cramer: Design Therapeutics Is 'Pure Spec,' Buy This Health Care Stock
summary: Cramer likes Silicon Motion, whose shares fell 2.2% to settle at $263.85 on Thursday. Wynn shares declined 0.8% to close at $95.43.
